description:
Perform an Environmental Justice (EJ) analysis using the San Francisco UrbanSim dataset to quantify household exposure to industrial land uses. Using the notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/industrial_exposure_ej.ipynb and data from /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5, calculate the industrial square footage (building_type_id 3) per household for all zones containing at least 50 households. Rank these zones into four exposure quartiles (1=lowest, 4=highest) based on industrial square footage per household.

Export the zone-level data to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/zone_industrial_exposure.csv with the following columns: zone_id, total_households, median_income, total_industrial_sqft, industrial_sqft_per_hh, and exposure_quartile.

Export a summary JSON to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/ej_summary.json containing the following keys: total_zones_analyzed, q1_median_zone_income, q2_median_zone_income, q3_median_zone_income, q4_median_zone_income, and highest_exposure_zone_id.

Save a visualization showing the relationship between exposure_quartile and median_income to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/income_vs_exposure.png. Ensure the notebook is fully executed.
